title: IACUC — Training and Consultation Services
content:
The Morgan State University Animal Research Facility (ARF) provides training and consultation services for investigators using laboratory animals. The Facility Director, Manager, and Veterinarian have over fifteen years of combined experience working with laboratory animals in research, teaching, and facility operations, with certifications in various animal care and use operations (AALAS-certified).

Services offered:
- Health and safety training workshops, offered semi-annually and by appointment.
- Basic rodent handling, animal care, and health-monitoring training, by appointment.
- Consultations for laboratory animal research design and IACUC protocol writing, by appointment.
- Individualized training for specialized surgical and behavioral techniques or other technical procedures, available by appointment.

Scheduling: To schedule a training or consultation, use MSU's Microsoft Bookings link (https://outlook.office365.com/owa/calendar/AnimalResearchFacilityMartinJenkinsHall@MorganStateUniversity365.onmicrosoft.com/bookings/) — log in with your MSU credentials.

2024-2025 schedule:
- IACUC meets 1:00-3:00 PM on the SECOND Thursday of each month.
- Protocols must be submitted by the THIRD Thursday of the prior month to be reviewed at the next meeting.

How to register for an iLab account:
1. Navigate to the core page: https://my.ilabsolutions.com/service_center/show_external/6195/research_infrastructure_core
2. In the upper-right-hand corner of the screen select the 'Register' option.
3. You will be directed to a series of questions; this information will be used to submit an account request.
4. Once registration is complete and submitted, it may take up to 24 hours for the account to be created.
5. Once your registration has been submitted, your PI will receive a notification that you have requested membership to their lab in iLab. They will need to approve your membership and assign Accounts (indices) for your use.

Create an Equipment Reservation: After being accepted into your PI's lab and assigned an Index, navigate to the core page, click 'Sign In' in the upper right, enter your iLab credentials, select the Schedule Equipment tab, click 'View Schedule' next to the instrument of interest, and click-and-drag the desired time period. A confirmation window allows verification of reservation details and payment information before saving.

Create a Service Request: After being accepted into your PI's lab and assigned an Index, you can create service requests through the same iLab portal.

Contacts: Dr. Ingrid Tulloch, Director — Ingrid.Tulloch@morgan.edu; Rysheem McGirt, Manager — Rysheem.Mcgirt@morgan.edu; Dr. Matthew Terzi, Clinical Veterinarian — M.Terzi@morgan.edu. Investigators seeking training resources should email Dr. Tulloch directly.

training_types: Health and safety training workshops (semi-annually + by appointment)
Basic rodent handling, animal care, health monitoring (by appointment)
Research design / IACUC protocol writing consultation (by appointment)
